question: What is the main purpose of Mr. Donnelly's visit to the clinic?
answer_en: To make a donation
answer_zh: 捐款
answer_ja: 寄付をするため

question: Why does Ivy have to stay with Blake Vance for two weeks?
options: Because Blake has a concussion and needs round-the-clock care
Because Ivy is his personal assistant
answer_en: Because Blake has a concussion and needs round-the-clock care
answer_zh: 因為Blake腦震盪需要全天候照護
answer_ja: ブレイクが脳震盪で24時間のケアが必要だから

question: What is the relationship between Dylan and Blake Vance?
answer_en: Uncle and nephew
answer_zh: 叔叔和侄子
answer_ja: 叔父と甥

question: What is the main concern about the Fillmore Project mentioned in the video?
answer_en: Financial irregularities
answer_zh: 財務不規則
answer_ja: 財務の不正

question: Why does Dylan want to return early from Bali?
options: Because the board is demanding answers about financial issues
Because he wants to visit family
answer_en: Because the board is demanding answers about financial issues
answer_zh: 因為董事會要求他回答財務問題
answer_ja: 取締役会が財務問題について説明を求めているから

question: What is Ivy's profession?
answer_en: Doctor
answer_zh: 醫生
answer_ja: 医者

question: What is the main reason Dylan is concerned about the rumors affecting his company?
options: They are affecting his personal reputation
answer_en: They are damaging investor confidence
answer_zh: 損害投資者信心
answer_ja: 投資家の信頼を損なっているから

question: What is the main challenge Ivy faces while caring for Blake?
options: Blake's concussion symptoms and mood swings
answer_en: Blake's concussion symptoms and mood swings
answer_zh: Blake的腦震盪症狀和情緒波動
answer_ja: ブレイクの脳震盪の症状と気分の変動

question: Why does Dylan cancel the remaining donations to the clinic?
options: Because of the disagreement with Blake and clinic issues
Because the clinic refused his donation
Because he wants to donate elsewhere
answer_en: Because of the disagreement with Blake and clinic issues
answer_zh: 因為與Blake和診所的爭執
answer_ja: ブレイクやクリニックとの意見の不一致のため

question: What is the significance of the helicopter in the story?
options: It is Dylan's private transport to avoid traffic
It is used for medical emergencies
It is a gift to Ivy
answer_en: It is Dylan's private transport to avoid traffic
answer_zh: Dylan用來避開交通的私人交通工具
answer_ja: ディランの渋滞を避けるためのプライベート交通手段

question: What injury did Blake Vance suffer during the visit?
answer_en: A head wound with concussion
answer_zh: 頭部受傷伴隨腦震盪
answer_ja: 脳震盪を伴う頭部の怪我

question: How does the clinic plan to close Blake's head wound?
answer_en: With staples
answer_zh: 用釘書針固定
answer_ja: ホチキスで閉じる

question: What side effect of concussion is mentioned as affecting Blake's behavior?
answer_en: Mood swings and memory loss
answer_zh: 情緒波動和記憶喪失
answer_ja: 気分の変動と記憶喪失

question: Why can't the clinic perform a scan for Blake's concussion?
options: They don't have the necessary imaging equipment
They don't have a doctor available
answer_en: They don't have the necessary imaging equipment
answer_zh: 診所沒有必要的影像設備
answer_ja: クリニックに必要な画像診断機器がないため

question: Who is requested to accompany Blake to get the scan at the hospital?
answer_en: Ivy Miller
answer_zh: Ivy Miller
answer_ja: アイビー・ミラー

question: What does Dylan think about the rumors affecting his stock?
options: He hopes good PR will make people forget
answer_en: He hopes good PR will make people forget
answer_zh: 他希望好的公關能讓人忘記謠言
answer_ja: 良いPRで人々に忘れさせたいと思っている

question: What is the reason for the flooding damage to the clinic mentioned in the video?
options: Last year's rains damaged the roofing
answer_en: Last year's rains damaged the roofing
answer_zh: 去年的雨水損壞了屋頂
answer_ja: 昨年の雨で屋根が損傷したため

question: What is the main reason Ivy is reluctant to stay with Blake initially?
options: She sees herself more as an administrator than a doctor
She wants to leave Bali soon
answer_en: She sees herself more as an administrator than a doctor
answer_zh: 她覺得自己比較像行政人員而非醫生
answer_ja: 自分を医者より管理者だと思っているため

question: What does Dylan accuse Blake of regarding the Fillmore Project?
answer_en: Stealing money and financial misconduct
answer_zh: 偷錢和財務不當行為
answer_ja: 金銭の盗難と財務不正行為

question: What is the reason Ivy gives for why people want to be spoon-fed information?
options: Because no one wants to look up information these days
Because the information is too complex
answer_en: Because no one wants to look up information these days
answer_zh: 因為現在沒有人想查資料
answer_ja: 最近は誰も情報を調べたがらないから

question: What does the phrase 'bleeding heart' most likely mean in the context of the video?
options: A person who is very compassionate and caring
A person who is physically injured
answer_en: A person who is very compassionate and caring
answer_zh: 非常有同情心和關懷的人
answer_ja: 非常に思いやりがあり、優しい人

question: What does 'spoon-feed' mean in the phrase 'people want to be spoon-fed'?
options: To be given information in an easy and direct way
To be fed with a spoon
answer_en: To be given information in an easy and direct way
answer_zh: 以簡單直接的方式提供資訊
answer_ja: 簡単で直接的な方法で情報を与えられること

question: What does 'dishevel' mean in the question 'do we just leave everything dishevel'?
answer_en: Untidy or messy
answer_zh: 凌亂的
answer_ja: 乱れた、散らかった

question: What does 'head wound' refer to?
answer_en: An injury to the head
answer_zh: 頭部受傷
answer_ja: 頭部の怪我

question: What does 'concussion' mean?
options: A brain injury caused by a blow to the head
answer_en: A brain injury caused by a blow to the head
answer_zh: 頭部受到撞擊引起的腦部損傷
answer_ja: 頭部への衝撃による脳の損傷

question: What does 'laceration' mean?
options: A deep cut or tear in the skin
answer_en: A deep cut or tear in the skin
answer_zh: 皮膚的深切口或撕裂
answer_ja: 皮膚の深い切り傷や裂傷

question: What does 'staples' mean in medical context?
options: Metal clips used to close wounds
answer_en: Metal clips used to close wounds
answer_zh: 用來閉合傷口的金屬夾
answer_ja: 傷口を閉じるための金属クリップ

question: What does 'round the clock care' mean?
answer_en: Care provided 24 hours a day
answer_zh: 全天候24小時照護
answer_ja: 24時間体制のケア

question: What does 'disgruntled' mean?
answer_en: Unhappy or dissatisfied
answer_zh: 不滿意的
answer_ja: 不満な

question: What does 'entourage' mean in the context of the meeting?
options: A group of people accompanying an important person
answer_en: A group of people accompanying an important person
answer_zh: 陪同重要人物的一群人
answer_ja: 重要人物に同行する一団

question: How would you describe the relationship between Dylan and Ivy based on their interactions?
answer_en: Complicated but developing mutual respect
answer_zh: 複雜但逐漸建立相互尊重
answer_ja: 複雑だが相互尊重を築きつつある

question: What challenges do rural clinics face according to the video?
answer_en: Limited staff, supplies, and equipment
answer_zh: 人手、物資和設備有限
answer_ja: スタッフ、物資、設備が限られている

question: Why is public relations important for charitable donations as shown in the video?
options: It helps donors get recognition and encourages more support
answer_en: It helps donors get recognition and encourages more support
answer_zh: 幫助捐贈者獲得認可並鼓勵更多支持
answer_ja: 寄付者の認知を助け、さらなる支援を促す

question: How does the video portray the impact of wealth on personal relationships?
options: Wealth can complicate trust and cause isolation
answer_en: Wealth can complicate trust and cause isolation
answer_zh: 財富可能使信任複雜化並造成孤立
answer_ja: 富は信頼を複雑にし孤立を招くことがある

question: What lessons about leadership and responsibility can be learned from Dylan's character?
options: Leadership requires balancing personal feelings and professional duties
answer_en: Leadership requires balancing personal feelings and professional duties
answer_zh: 領導需要平衡個人感情和職責
answer_ja: リーダーシップは個人的感情と職務のバランスを取ることが必要

question: How does the video illustrate the challenges of healthcare in rural areas?
options: By showing limited resources and need for donations
answer_en: By showing limited resources and need for donations
answer_zh: 展示資源有限和需要捐款
answer_ja: 限られた資源と寄付の必要性を示している

question: What does the video suggest about the importance of trust in family and work relationships?
options: Trust is essential and can be fragile
answer_en: Trust is essential and can be fragile
answer_zh: 信任是必要且脆弱的
answer_ja: 信頼は重要であり脆弱であることもある

question: How does Ivy's character development reflect the theme of compassion in the video?
options: She grows from reluctant to dedicated caregiver
answer_en: She grows from reluctant to dedicated caregiver
answer_zh: 她從不情願變成敬業的照護者
answer_ja: 彼女は気乗りしなかった状態から献身的な介護者へ成長する

question: What role does communication play in resolving conflicts shown in the video?
options: Open and honest communication helps resolve misunderstandings
answer_en: Open and honest communication helps resolve misunderstandings
answer_zh: 開放且誠實的溝通有助於解決誤會
answer_ja: オープンで正直なコミュニケーションが誤解を解決するのに役立つ

question: 延伸口說 fallback
answer_en: A
answer_zh: A
answer_ja: A
